description: The main property being shopped, derived from filename
name: property_name

description: The date the data was pulled/shopped
name: rateshop_date

description: The date of the actual stay
name: arrival_date

description: TRUE if Remark indicates Sold Out
name: is_sold_out

description: Minimum Length of Stay extracted from Remarks
name: min_los

description: Timestamp when the record was inserted into BigQuery
name: inserted_at
